name: SuranceBay Insurance Distribution & Contracting API
what_it_does: SuranceBay insurance distribution platform REST API for insurance carriers, agencies, and IMOs/FMOs managing producer contracting, licensing verification, appointment management, and compliance. Enables AI agents to manage producer contracting workflow and hierarchy for insurance distribution automation, handle state insurance license verification and NIPR data integration for producer compliance automation, access carrier appointment submission and management for producer appointment lifecycle automation, retrieve background check and E&O verification for producer onboarding compliance automation, manage continuing education (CE) tracking for insurance producer compliance automation, handle hierarchy and override commission structure management for insurance distribution compensation, access producer status and readiness-to-sell verification for distribution eligibility automation, retrieve producer performance and production reporting for distribution analytics, manage market conduct compliance and licensing exception monitoring for carrier regulatory risk management, and integrate SuranceBay with NIPR, insurance carrier appointment portals, and agency management systems for full distribution compliance ecosystem.
use_cases: Onboarding producers from distribution compliance agents
Verifying licenses from producer eligibility agents
Managing appointments from carrier compliance agents
Tracking CE credits from licensing agents
not_for: Individual consumer insurance quoting and binding
best_when: An insurance carrier, IMO/FMO, or large insurance agency wanting AI agents to automate producer contracting, license verification, carrier appointment management, E&O tracking, and compliance monitoring within SuranceBay's distribution management platform.
avoid_when: PRODUCER APPOINTMENT ANTI-TWISTING MONITORING: Automated producer appointment management must not facilitate insurance twisting (inducing policyholders to lapse existing coverage for new coverage benefiting the producer); carrier automated appointment processes must include market conduct monitoring for appointment patterns suggesting twisting violations. STATE APPOINTMENT FILING ACCURACY AND TIMING: Automated carrier appointment submission via SuranceBay must be filed within state-mandated timing windows after producer contracting; automated appointment filing delays beyond state deadline creates producer unauthorized sale exposure and carrier market conduct violation. NIPR DATA FRESHNESS FOR LICENSE VERIFICATION: SuranceBay NIPR license status reflects NIPR data feed freshness (typically 24-48 hours); automated readiness-to-sell verification using SuranceBay must verify NIPR sync timestamp before relying on license status for real-time appointment or contracting decision; stale NIPR data creates authorization of suspended or expired license producers.

auth.notes: SuranceBay uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. St. Petersburg, Florida HQ. Founded 2005. Private (Francisco Partners PE, acquired 2021). Insurance distribution platform for life, health, and P&C carriers and IMOs/FMOs. NIPR integration for license verification. Sircon/Vertafore competitor. 200+ carrier integrations. Producer contracting, compliance, and distribution analytics. Competes with Vertafore, Sircon (NAIC), and AgencyBloc for insurance producer management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual subscription for carriers and IMOs/FMOs
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per platform tier; carrier and IMO/FMO pricing differs; volume pricing based on producer count
pricing.notes: St. Petersburg FL. Francisco Partners PE. Founded 2005. Insurance distribution compliance platform. Per-producer volume pricing. Enterprise annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; NIPR sync and appointment queries throttled; webhooks for contracting and appointment events

known_agent_gotchas: NIPR LICENSE DATA FRESHNESS 24-48 HOUR LAG: SuranceBay license status from NIPR has 24-48 hour sync lag; automated readiness-to-sell verification using SuranceBay license data must check NIPR last-sync timestamp; license changes (new license, suspension, reinstatement) may not be reflected in real-time; for time-sensitive appointment decisions, verify NIPR directly via NIPR API for current status

STATE APPOINTMENT FILING TIMING WINDOW COMPLIANCE: State insurance department appointment filing deadlines vary (California 30 days, New York 15 days from contracting); automated appointment submission must trigger within state-specific deadline window; automated appointment filing for multi-state producers with different deadline windows requires per-state filing trigger management

PRODUCER HIERARCHY COMMISSION OVERRIDE ACCURACY: Automated SuranceBay hierarchy configuration for IMO/FMO override commission structures must correctly map producer hierarchy levels and override rates; automated commission configuration errors create downstream compensation disputes and carrier excess commission payment exposure

Background check adverse action FCRA compliance — automated producer onboarding using background check data integrated with SuranceBay must comply with Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) adverse action notice requirements; automated declination of producer based on background check without FCRA adverse action notice creates FCRA violation

E&O certificate expiry monitoring automation — automated E&O insurance tracking must alert before certificate expiry (typically 30-60 days) and gate readiness-to-sell status on current E&O; automated suspension of readiness-to-sell on E&O expiry without notice to producer creates distribution disruption; implement advance expiry notification workflow

CE credit state reciprocity and exemption tracking — automated continuing education tracking must apply state-specific CE hour requirements and credit reciprocity between states; automated CE compliance status using home state completion without multi-state CE reconciliation creates compliance gap for producers licensed in multiple states
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance distribution compliance. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Producer PII, license, and compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance distribution. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Producer PII, license, and compliance data.
